registration_to_reference.coordinate_convention: 0 is the reference AABB minimum and 1 is its maximum on each world axis; values outside [0,1] lie outside the reference bounds

normalization.normalized_extent: largest dimension equals 1.0; aspect ratio is preserved

manifest_metadata.coordinate_notes: Registered HRA female common frame; +X anatomical left, +Y superior, +Z anterior; includes lobes and intrapulmonary bronchi but omits larynx, trachea, and main bronchi.
manifest_metadata.source: Human Reference Atlas 3D Reference Object Library

units.note: All physical measurements preserve source units; area and volume use squared/cubed source units.
